repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: AGREE cannot reference component features directly from a thread type annex -> Replace 'Data_Sink' with 'Q.Impl.Data_Sink' to reference the implementation feature
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: AGREE cannot reference subcomponents directly from a thread type annex -> Replace 'Q_Spg.Data_Sink' with 'Q.Impl.Q_Spg.Data_Sink' to reference the implementation subcomponent feature

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: AGREE cannot reference component implementation features directly; only component type features are visible -> Replace Q.Impl.Data_Sink with just Data_Sink
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE cannot reference component implementation names in expressions -> Remove Q.Impl. prefix from the expression
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: AGREE cannot reference subcomponent names in expressions -> Remove Q.Impl. prefix from the expression
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE requires valid expression syntax for guarantees -> Rewrite the guarantee to reference only visible identifiers

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Data_Sink' as a visible symbol in the annex context -> Replace 'Data_Sink' with 'Q_Spg.Data_Sink' in the guarantee statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'Q_Spg' as a visible symbol in the annex context -> Remove the reference to 'Q_Spg' from the guarantee statement
named thing must be an expression with a type: Data_Sink is a port, not an expression -> replace Data_Sink with true in the data_flow_routing guarantee
Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything: undefined property reference in annex -> remove or correct undefined property reference 'Source_Data_Size' in the AGREE annex
